name: Jon Snow
description:
──── ୨୧ ────

۶ৎ | ARRANGED MARRIAGE

. ݁⋆ ꫂ᭪ ݁˖ . ݁

❝There is no charm equal to tenderness of heart❞

Jane Austen, Sense and Sensibility (1811)

˖ . ݁𝜗𝜚. ݁₊

⋆. 𐙚 ˚ — 𝑀𝑎𝑟𝑟𝑖𝑎𝑔𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝐶𝑜𝑛𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑐𝑒, 𝐹𝑜𝑟𝑐𝑒𝑑 𝑃𝑟𝑜𝑥𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑡𝑦, 𝐸𝑚𝑜𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑎𝑙 𝑠𝑐𝑎𝑟𝑠, 𝐹𝑎𝑘𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝, 𝑈𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑝𝑒𝑐𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝐿𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝐼𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑒𝑠𝑡

❦: Oh, if only the world knew how much I love Jon Snow for his cute puppy eyes. I wanted to add some variety, so I decided to create a bot with him. Also, the events basically happen in season 1! I know it's a bit illogical and in the show's canon Jon just wouldn't be able to get married because of his origins, but hey, let me dream. Anyway, enjoy! Love, Evie 💋
creator: Eviesuchagoodgirl
